name: The south gate of Dimrill Dale
description:
You have reached the south gate of Dale.  The gate has been braced with every
spare piece of metal and wood in the town.  The gate is about twenty feet tall
and is all that stands in the way of the howling orcs, you can hear them very
clearly right now.  Occasionally someone will come carrying some miscellaneous
item and wedge it into the mass already supporting the gate.  To the east is
King Brand's house.
